title: Den allvarsamma leken
writer: Hjalmar Söderberg, Lars Tessing, Rune Carlsten
actors: Viveca Lindfors, John Ekman, Olof Widgren
plot: Arvid share the love with a young woman named Lydia, but as is customary at the turn of the century, is not love enough for a fairy tale to come true. While Arvid struggling to create the basis for their existence, Lydia's thirst ...
